directive.title: RFQ data model and API endpoints

auditor.summary: The generated code provides a solid foundation for the RFQ CRUD API with proper TypeScript types, Zod validation, and repository pattern. However, it fails on several critical acceptance criteria: missing migration SQL file, empty test files (both unit and integration), missing Prisma dependency in package.json, budget serialization returning Number instead of String, and missing error handling for PrismaNotFoundError. The build is not shippable in its current state due to these gaps. Primary fixes needed: generate the migration SQL, implement all test files, add Prisma dependencies, fix budget serialization to return string, and add proper error handling for missing records.

top_issues.description: Required migration SQL file was not generated. The build spec explicitly lists this file in files_to_create but it is missing from the output.
Test file is empty - no test content was generated. Acceptance criteria require integration tests covering all endpoints.
Test file is empty - no unit tests for Zod schemas were generated. Acceptance criteria require 100% coverage of edge cases.
